weightingGuidance: Higher weight on: three-statement integration, working capital, tax reconciliation, margin plausibility, scenario engine. Gate failures are a P1 or P2 finding depending on the scope of impact.

sourceModelSummary.model_purpose: A development and operating financial model for a proposed live music venue (The Bend Live House) in Melbourne, used to forecast construction funding, operations, debt service and investor equity returns.
sourceModelSummary.timeline: Model runs FY25 (Feb 2025 start) through FY38, a 12-year horizon covering pre-construction, an approx 2027 construction/fit-out period, and stabilised operations from FY28 onward, with a 20-year lease and exit assumed around FY38.
key_drivers: Event-day volume and ticket/VHA pricing by event type (Music GA, EDM, Comedy etc.)
Construction capex and financing mix (bank debt, PE equity, partnership deposits)
Bank debt terms (8% rate, 10-year term) and DSCR/ICR coverage
Exit EBITDA multiple (7.0x) and WACC used for valuation and equity IRR
Scenario multipliers for revenue, cost, capex, inflation and opening delay

sheet_map.Readme: Index describing purpose of key tabs; navigation aid only, no calculations.
sheet_map.KEY OUTPUTS >>: Navigation divider tab with no financial content.
sheet_map.General Information: Narrative project description of the venue concept; does not feed calculations.
sheet_map.Equity Dashboard: Investor-facing outputs including IRR, MOIC, NPV sensitivity table and valuation bridge.
sheet_map.Debt Dashboard: Annual lender metrics: revenue, EBITDA, closing cash, total debt, DSCR and ICR.
sheet_map.Dashboard (backup): Archived values-only snapshot of dashboard metrics, explicitly non-authoritative.
sheet_map.Cashflow: Annual cash-flow waterfall including equity inflows, debt drawdowns, and closing cash reconciliation.
sheet_map.P&L: Annual profit and loss build with construction/ops flags, revenue lines (VHA, Premium Sales, Premium F&B) and cost lines.
sheet_map.Balance Sheet: Annual balance sheet with cash, restricted cash reserves, receivables, inventory and lease deposits.
sheet_map.Valuation: DCF and returns engine: WACC, cost of equity/debt, tax rate, exit multiple, project IRR and NPV.
sheet_map.Inputs: Master input sheet covering project timing, lease assumptions, and other core drivers feeding the model.
sheet_map.Revenue Assumptions: Event-type pricing and capacity assumptions (Music GA, EDM, Comedy etc.) underlying VHA revenue.
sheet_map.Expense Assumptions: Staffing roles, salaries, on-costs and mobilisation/pre-operational cost schedule.
sheet_map.Construction Timeline: Capex build-up by category (Consultants, Structure, Civil, ICT, FF&E, Services, Finance).
sheet_map.Scenarios: Scenario toggle sheet with Base/Optimistic/Pessimistic and delay/capex scenario multipliers.
sheet_map.Financial Summary: Consolidated P&L and balance sheet summary by FY with totals.
sheet_map.Financial Summary (backup): Archived version of the Financial Summary sheet for comparison/backup purposes.
sheet_map.Debt: Detailed debt schedule with opening/closing balances, start/end flags, term and rate.
sheet_map.GST Calculation: GST computation on revenue and costs by period, feeding cash flow and tax treatment.
sheet_map.Calendar Assumptions: Event days per year by event type, capacity and sell-through percentage assumptions.
sheet_map.Partnership Assumptions: Sponsorship tiers, value-in-kind estimates, and equity ownership/distribution waterfall policy.
sheet_map.Legend: Empty/placeholder sheet, likely intended for formatting key.
sheet_map.Timing: Empty sheet, referenced elsewhere as authoritative timing source but no visible content.
sheet_map.Original Capex: Pre-operational funding sources breakdown (Founder, Industry Partners, PE, Bank, Partnership Deposits).
sheet_map.Disclaimer: Standard legal disclaimer sections; no financial content.
sheet_map.Inputs for Dashboard: Linked metric summary feeding dashboard displays (WACC, IRR, exit multiple etc.).
sheet_map.For Deck: Summary of debt and leverage metrics formatted for presentation deck.
sheet_map.For Teaser Deck: Key headline metrics (IRR, MOIC, DSCR, LTV, LTC) formatted for teaser marketing deck.
sheet_map.GANTT - MASTER OPTION: Presentation-only Gantt chart of project programme; explicitly not authoritative.
sheet_map.Audit QA: Audit remediation register tracking findings, severity and status from prior review batches.
sheet_map.Assumption Register: Register of external-reliance assumptions with status (controlled default, provisional, model-supported).
sheet_map.Model Checks: Live validation gates and formula checks confirming key inputs are active and error-free.
sheet_map.Redundant Input Review: Review closing out static-scan findings on apparently redundant or zero input values.
sheet_map.Validation Closure: Governance log tracking closure status of prior audit findings by priority.
sheet_map.Change Log: Record of remediation changes made during Audit 2, with sheet ranges, reasons and validation notes.
sheet_map.Accounting & COA Map: Accounting policy notes clarifying this is a forecast mapping only, not a formal chart of accounts.

immediate_observations: Equity Dashboard contains bizarre far-future/invalid date values (e.g. year 57503, 167946) suggesting broken date formulas in the sensitivity table.

Dashboard (backup) and Financial Summary (backup) show materially different EBITDA and Closing Cash figures than the live Debt Dashboard and Financial Summary tabs for the same FYs, raising reconciliation concerns.
Timing and Legend sheets are empty despite being referenced elsewhere as authoritative sources, which is inconsistent.

Extensive self-documented audit trail (Audit QA, Assumption Register, Model Checks, Validation Closure, Change Log) indicates this model has already been through remediation cycles; claims of PASS status should be independently verified rather than taken at face value.
DSRA (Debt Service Reserve) toggle is off/not required per Assumption Register and For Teaser Deck, which is a governance-flagged unconfirmed lender item.
Several critical inputs (BAS frequency, DSRA sizing, rent/outgoings assumptions) are flagged internally as provisional or controlled defaults pending external confirmation.
PE Tranche is labeled as inactive debt classified as equity within the Debt sheet, which could cause confusion regarding capital structure classification.
sourceModelSummary.validation_focus: Reconcile live outputs (Debt Dashboard, Financial Summary, Cashflow) against backup/legacy sheets to confirm which is authoritative; verify the broken date/sensitivity formulas on Equity Dashboard; trace Timing and Legend sheet dependencies; independently retest the self-reported PASS status of Model Checks and closed audit findings; and confirm treatment of PE tranche as equity vs debt and DSRA/lender assumptions.
